title: Diff Checker
summary: Advanced text comparison tool with analytics, history, file upload support (PDF, DOCX, code files), and document formatting for JSON, Python, JavaScript, SQL, and more.

title: WordGen
summary: Context-aware synonym suggestions and AI-powered sentence rephrasing with optional LLM integration.

title: JWT.io Clone
summary: Complete JWT token decoder and encoder with algorithm support and signature verification.

title: Wordle Clone
summary: A fully functional Wordle clone game with daily words and statistics.

summary: A live version of your college microblog. (Needs a backend host.)

title: ChatGPT‑generated micro‑app
summary: Slot for any experimental app — plug in a URL and it works.
